---
title: "Blog"
toc: true
listing:
  contents: "posts/**/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
  feed: true
---

Welcome to the `carecodeconnect` blog! 🤗

*"Revisioning data science for the age of AI"*

New posts will appear below!

```{=html}
<p class="small border rounded-2 px-3 py-2 bg-light mt-3">
  <strong>RSS.</strong> Follow new posts in a feed reader: click the
  <a href="./blog.xml" title="Open RSS feed"><i class="bi bi-rss" aria-hidden="true"></i><span class="visually-hidden"> RSS </span></a>
  icon in the site header, or subscribe with this URL:
  <a href="https://www.carecodeconnect.io/blog.xml"><code>https://www.carecodeconnect.io/blog.xml</code></a>
</p>
```
